steps.clue: Shoot the four tombstones in the required order.
Obtain and play the three audio reels in sequence.
Reconstruct S.O.P.H.I.A. from the scattered bones.
Teleport to the bedroom and place the Kronorium on the stage.
Charge the four Apothicon Eggs into Gateworms.
Use the Gateworms to retrieve the four Runes of Creation.
Enter the Kronorium symbols and recover the Summoning Key.
Throw the Summoning Key at the seven marked objects.
Charge the key, break the Shadowman's shield, and defeat him.
